personalInfo.name: Aryam Gupta
bio: * I am a full-stack engineer with 2+ years of experience
* building scalable web applications and real-time systems.
* I specialize in TypeScript, Next.js, and Node.js,
* with a strong focus on performance and system design.
* I have hands-on experience working with event-driven
* architectures using Kafka and MQTT, building secure APIs,
* I enjoy creating real-time dashboards, backend systems,
* Beyond development, I have a strong foundation in
* data structures and algorithms, and I love solving
* complex problems with clean, efficient solutions.
* When I'm not coding, I'm exploring new technologies,
* contributing to projects, or leveling up my skills.
interests: * * Building web applications and exploring new technologies
* * Creating real-time features and interactive user experiences
* * Working on backend systems and APIs
* * Learning about system design and scalable architectures
* * Solving problems using data structures and algorithms
* * Contributing to projects and improving development skills

experiences.company: Vinayan (India) Consulting and Services Pvt Ltd
description: Developed and maintained RadarOps Central, a full-stack system used to manage and process traffic violation data from radar monitoring devices.
Built responsive admin dashboards using React.js enabling operators to review, filter, and manage large volumes of violation records.
Designed backend services using Node.js and Express.js for handling device data ingestion, API processing, and system workflows.
Implemented WebSocket-based communication to enable real-time updates between radar devices and the backend monitoring system.
Automated challan report generation using Puppeteer,reducing manual operational workload and enabling daily automated reporting.
Managed backend deployment on Linux servers using PM2, ensuring reliable uptime and efficient service management.
Developed a real-time monitoring dashboard for industrial wearable devices using Next.js and React, enabling visualization of worker
Built backend APIs using TypeScript and Bun.js to process device data and support dashboard queries with optimized response times.
Designed database schemas and implemented data access layers using Prisma ORM and PostgreSQL for scalable device and user
Integrated authentication and session management using NextAuth, implementing role-based access control for administrators and
Worked with event-driven data streams where device updates were consumed through Kafka/MQTT pipelines, enabling near
Built device management modules for onboarding, configuration, and monitoring of multiple devices through a centralized admin panel.
